Step 1 of 2 · Basic Product Info

Add New Product

Fill in the basic product info and upload your main images here. In the next step you will add variants (color, RAM, storage, size …) with separate images, prices and stock for each combination.

{% csrf_token %}
Basic details
Category-specific attributes will appear on the right once you pick one.
What happens next? After saving you will be taken to the Add Variants page where you enter each color / size combination, upload variant images and set individual prices & stock.
Main images
+
These are the default images shown before any variant is selected. You can upload variant-specific images (e.g. per color) in the next step.
Category attributes Select a category first

After you choose a category above, extra attributes (model number, material, display size, etc.) will appear here. These apply to the whole product, not per variant.

Loading attributes…
